raw_response: Based on the detailed review and logical deductions made throughout this lengthy exploration, I conclude that the most probable diagnosis for the described condition—an 18-year-old female presenting with an ovarian mass accompanied by elevated lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) levels and normal alpha-fetoprotein (AFP)—is **malignant teratoma (Option C).**
